findings.title: SOURCE_ROOT defined conceptually but never exported as shell variable
findings.detail: Value 'mnt/S005-P004/assets' in instruction_file is a relative path shown as documentation, but shell commands use it literally. No 'export SOURCE_ROOT=...' or equivalent found in activation prompt.
findings.suggestion:
Add at the start of the activation prompt:
  First, set up your working root:
    export SOURCE_ROOT="/sessions/*/mnt/.../assets"
  Then all subsequent commands can use $SOURCE_ROOT/...

findings.title: No explicit mkdir instruction for output directory
findings.detail: Agent may fail if output subdirectories don't exist.
findings.suggestion: Add: mkdir -p $SOURCE_ROOT/output/src/shaked_wg_agent/{scrapers,notifier,api,publisher} $SOURCE_ROOT/output/data/profiles $SOURCE_ROOT/output/tests
